name: wisadel
description: Wisadel desktop AI conversation and image generation platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,DESKTOP,ADMIN -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev -w @wisadel/api" "npm run dev -w @wisadel/desktop" "npm run dev -w @wisadel/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @wisadel/contracts && npm run build -w @wisadel/api && npm run build -w @wisadel/desktop && npm run build -w @wisadel/admin
scripts.test: npm run test -w @wisadel/contracts && npm run test -w @wisadel/api && npm run test -w @wisadel/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @wisadel/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @wisadel/api && npm run typecheck -w @wisadel/desktop && npm run typecheck -w @wisadel/admin
scripts.package:win: npm run build -w @wisadel/contracts && npm run package:win -w @wisadel/desktop
